name: cairn
description: Home marketplace for the cairn plugin — milestone-driven development and tracking for Claude Code projects (language-agnostic core, per-repo toolchain profiles).

plugins.name: cairn
plugins.description: Milestone-driven development workflow and tracking system for Claude Code projects: a language-agnostic core with per-repo toolchain profiles (R, Python, or generic), plan/implement/review skills, hotfix and release paths, Fable review briefs, and a self-auditing cairn/ file system.
